languages.text: "Несение слова Императора и возжигание Его огня в сердцах — важнейшая миссия для Человечества. Он праведен".
"Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."
languages.original_text: "Несение слова Императора и возжигание Его огня в сердцах — важнейшая миссия для Человечества. Он праведен".

traits.locale_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."
"Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."
"Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

languages.text: 「天皇の御言葉をもって、人々の心に火を灯すことは、人類にとって最も重要な使命である。彼は正しい」
languages.original_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

traits.locale_text: 「天皇の御言葉をもって、人々の心に火を灯すことは、人類にとって最も重要な使命である。彼は正しい。」

languages.text: “传播帝皇真言，在世人心中点燃祂的火焰，就是人类最重要的使命。他是正义的。”
languages.original_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

traits.locale_text: “传播帝皇真言，在世人心中点燃祂的火焰，就是人类最重要的使命。他是正义的。”

languages.text: «Extender la palabra del Emperador y alimentar Su llama en los corazones ajenos es la misión más importante de la Humanidad. Es un hombre virtuoso».
languages.original_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

traits.locale_text: «Extender la palabra del Emperador y alimentar Su llama en los corazones ajenos es la misión más importante de la Humanidad. Es un hombre virtuoso».

languages.text: "Das Wort des Imperators zu verkünden und Sein Feuer in den Herzen anderer zu entfachen, ist die wichtigste Mission der Menschheit. Er ist rechtschaffen."
languages.original_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

traits.locale_text: "Das Wort des Imperators zu verkünden und Sein Feuer in den Herzen anderer zu entfachen, ist die wichtigste Mission der Menschheit. Er ist rechtschaffen."

languages.text: « Répandre la parole de l'Empereur et attiser Sa flamme dans le cœur d'autrui est la mission la plus importante de l'humanité. Voilà ce qui fait la vertu de cet homme. »
languages.original_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

traits.locale_text: « Répandre la parole de l'Empereur et attiser Sa flamme dans le cœur d'autrui est la mission la plus importante de l'humanité. Voilà ce qui fait la vertu de cet homme. »

languages.text: "İmparator'un sözlerini paylaşmak ve O'nun ateşini başkalarının kalplerinde tutuşturmak, İnsanlığın en önemli vazifesidir."
languages.original_text: "Bringing the word of the Emperor and kindling His fire in the hearts of others is Humanity's most important mission. He is righteous."

traits.locale_text: "İmparator'un sözlerini paylaşmak ve O'nun ateşini başkalarının kalplerinde tutuşturmak, İnsanlığın en önemli vazifesidir."
